sections.instruction: Questions 21-23: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 24 and 25: Choose TWO letters A-F. Questions 26-30: Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: How long did Louise work at a radio station?
Why does Louise want to do a Masters?
options: to get a promotion in her current job

questions.content: How long will it take to do the Masters part-time rather than the modular route?
Which two things must Louise have to join the course?
options: Either a bachelor’s degree or work experience

sections.instruction: Questions 31-35: Complete the sentences below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer. Questions 36-40: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.content:
(31) Indian Railways is owned and {{BLANK}} by the government of India.
(32) There are more than {{BLANK}} million people working for Indian Railways.
(33) The {{BLANK}} of the railways from 1857 occurred under Robert Maitland Brereton.
(34) The joining of the East Indian Railway with the Great Indian Peninsula Railway led to a network of {{BLANK}} kilometres.
(35) The route from Bombay to Calcutta, opened in 1870, was an {{BLANK}} for the book Around the World in 80 days.
